CustomField.description: Controls the order post-trigger actions run in within the same transaction, lowest first. Actions that share the same order value run in a stable, predictable sequence (ordered by their developer name), so the order does not change between deployments. You can change this in your org to reorder actions without a package upgrade.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Lower numbers run first. Use gaps (10, 20, 30) so new actions can be inserted between existing ones without renumbering.
CustomField.label: Order
